You are a Flutter UI developer. I will give you base64-encoded screenshots of a mobile app called "بلّغ" (Baligh Lite) — a Mauritanian community alert system.

Your task is to replicate the EXACT UI style of this app in Flutter with 100% fidelity.

## Design System to extract and apply globally:

### Colors:
- Primary background: #1B6B2F (dark green)
- Secondary/card background: #FFFFFF
- Accent yellow: #F5C518
- Text primary: #1A1A1A
- Text secondary: #6B6B6B
- Danger/error: #E53935 (red)
- Success: #43A047 (green)
- Warning: #FB8C00 (orange)
- Bottom nav background: white with shadow
- Bottom nav background: white with shadow
### Typography:   
- App uses Arabic RTL layout (directionality: RTL)
- Font: use Google Fonts "Cairo" or "Tajawal" for Arabic text
- Title size: 20sp bold
- Subtitle: 14sp regular
- Body: 13sp regular

### Layout patterns:
- Scaffold with white body + green AppBar
- AppBar: solid green (#1B6B2F), white title (Arabic, right-aligned), back arrow on right side (RTL)
- Cards: white, rounded corners (BorderRadius 16), subtle shadow (elevation 2-3)
- Bottom NavigationBar: 5 items (الرئيسية, بلاغاتي, زر البلاغ, تنبيهات, حسابي), the center button is a large yellow floating circle with a megaphone icon elevated above the bar
- Padding: 16px horizontal, 12px vertical consistently

### Component patterns:
- Report cards: white card with left-colored border (color by category), emoji icon on right, title bold + description + timestamp + confirm/deny counters
- Category grid: 3-column grid of white cards with emoji + Arabic label, selected state = green border + green background tint
- Filter chips: rounded pill buttons, selected = green filled, unselected = white with border
- Toggle switches: green when ON
- Notification items: white cards with green dot indicator for unread
- Map screen: light green map tiles, colored emoji pins per category
- Success screen: full green background, large yellow checkmark circle, white text
- Profile screen: green header with yellow avatar circle, stats row (white cards)

### Screens to implement (from the base64 screenshots):
1. Splash / Welcome screen (شاشة الترحيب)
2. Login screen (تسجيل الدخول)
3. Register screen (إنشاء حساب)
4. Home / Feed screen (الرئيسية) — list of report cards with خطر/تنبيه/آمن filter tabs
5. New Report Step 1 (بلاغ جديد) — category grid + description field
6. New Report Step 2 — map location picker
7. Report Sent confirmation screen
8. Report Details screen (تفاصيل البلاغ) — credibility bar + vote buttons
9. Notifications screen (الإشعارات)
10. My Reports screen (سجل بلاغاتي)
11. Filter screen (تصفية البلاغات)
12. Map screen (خريطة البلاغات)
13. Profile screen (حسابي)
14. Settings screen (الإعدادات)
15. Emergency Numbers screen (أرقام الطوارئ)

### Technical requirements:
- Flutter 3.x, Dart null-safe
- Use MaterialApp with RTL locale: `locale: Locale('ar')`, `textDirection: TextDirection.rtl`
- Use `google_fonts` package for Cairo font
- Use `flutter_map` or `google_maps_flutter` for map screens
- Organize with feature-based folder structure:
  /lib
    /core (theme, constants, colors)
    /features
      /auth
      /home
      /report
      /notifications
      /profile
      /map
      /emergency
- Define a global ThemeData in /core/theme.dart with all colors, text styles, card themes
- Use GoRouter or Navigator 2.0 for routing
- Stateless widgets where possible, StatefulWidget only when needed
- No hardcoded colors inline — always reference theme or AppColors constants

### Special UI details to respect:
- The center FAB in bottom nav is oversized yellow circle, elevated, with shadow
- Report cards have a thin left border colored by severity (red=خطر, orange=تنبيه, green=آمن)
- The credibility bar in report details is a LinearProgressIndicator with gradient green
- Emergency numbers screen: each row has colored number (red for 17/18, blue for 12, green for 15) + Arabic name + French subtitle + phone icon
- Stepper in new report flow: 3 steps shown as circles connected by line at the top
